advert.description: The ad begins with the group scene and ends with the product box 'LINDT CHOC WAFFER' visible at 02:07.
The ad features winners and ends with the website 'postcodecoteriy.co.uk' on a door at 03:08.
The ad showcases Easter products and ends with the 'Big on quality' logo at 03:29.
The Steve Carell commercial ends with him holding the toast package and 'Warburtons' text at 04:00.
The vacuum cleaner ad concludes with the 'BIssell.co.uk' and logo appearing at 04:27.
The indigestion remedy ad shows the bottle/box and slogan 'FOR 7 SYMPTOMS THINK GAVISCON' at 04:48.
The 'Table Full of Gold' ad segment runs for 10s from 04:49, ending around 04:59 before transitioning to the next ad.
The cake ad features the family gathering and ends with the 'Mrs Kipling' box visible at 05:16.
